title: rosa coriifolia var. venosa
intro: Rosa coriifolia var. venosa, also known as the "Venous Sweetbrier" or "Venous Rose", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rosa coriifolia var. venosa include its potential to calm the nervous system, ease digestive problems, and protect against infections. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and may also be used in the form of a tincture or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
